name: get_conversion_status
description: Check the status of an asynchronous PDF conversion. When you submit a conversion with a 'webhook' parameter, the conversion runs asynchronously and you receive a job ID. Use this endpoint to poll for the status of that job. The response includes the current status (queued, processing, finished, error) and, when finished, a URL to download the generated PDF.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The conversion job ID returned when an asynchronous conversion was initiated (when a webhook URL was provided in the original conversion request).
